paper.title: Free ChatGPT for transitioning U.S. servicemembers and veterans
paper.abstract: OpenAI is offering U.S. servicemembers and veterans within 12 months of retirement or separation a free year of ChatGPT Plus to support their transition to civilian life. The tools can help with resumes, interviews, education, and planning for what’s next.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
